final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: industrial documentary photography
Primary request: wide-angle low-angle shot of a giant electric arc furnace during steel tapping, with molten steel pouring down like an orange-red waterfall
Scene/backdrop: modern steel smelting plant interior, dimly lit industrial hall with steel framework ceiling visible through smoke and light
Subject: massive electric arc furnace as the dominant element, workers in heat-resistant suits and face shields operating equipment in the distance, strong scale contrast between human figures and giant machinery
Style/medium: industrial photography, slow shutter speed to capture motion blur of flowing molten steel
Composition/framing: wide-angle low-angle perspective, dramatic upward view emphasizing the grandeur of industrial machinery
Lighting/mood: molten steel as the primary light source creating spectacular sparks, dramatic contrast between dark environment and glowing orange-red metal, atmospheric and powerful
Color palette: deep gray, iron black contrasted with intense orange-red of molten steel, metallic dust tones
Materials/textures: realistic molten metal flow with motion blur, industrial steel surfaces, metal dust on floor, heat-resistant fabric textures
Constraints: maintain the scale contrast between workers and machinery, capture the dynamic motion of pouring steel
Avoid: oversaturated colors, cartoonish sparks, clean factory environment, plastic-looking materials, watermark
